recommendations.title: The Blair Witch Project
recommendations.overview: In October of 1994 three student filmmakers disappeared in the woods near Burkittsville, Maryland, while shooting a documentary. A year later their footage was found.

recommendations.title: Curse of the Blair Witch
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary exploring the life of the Blair Witch and the three missing student filmmakers.

recommendations.title: The Objective
recommendations.overview: A team of US Special Ops forces is dispatched to a remote mountain region of Afghanistan with orders to locate an influential Muslim cleric. While on the mission they find themselves lost in a Middle Eastern 'Bermuda Triangle' of ancient evil and fac

recommendations.title: Marrowbone
recommendations.overview: A young man and his three younger siblings are plagued by a sinister presence in the sprawling manor in which they live.

recommendations.title: Oddity
recommendations.overview: After the brutal murder of her twin sister, Darcy goes after those responsible by using haunted items as her tools for revenge.

recommendations.title: Nocturne
recommendations.overview: Inside the halls of an elite arts academy, a timid music student begins to outshine her more accomplished and outgoing twin sister when she discovers a mysterious notebook belonging to a recently deceased classmate.

recommendations.title: Constantine
recommendations.overview: John Constantine has literally been to Hell and back. When he teams up with a policewoman to solve the mysterious suicide of her twin sister, their investigation takes them through the world of demons and angels that exists beneath the landscape of c

recommendations.title: An Inspector Calls
recommendations.genres: Drama, Crime, Thriller, Mystery, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Northern England, 1912. The dinner of a wealthy family is interrupted by Inspector Goole, who only announces that a young woman has committed suicide. Then, he simply asks everyone present, one by one, if they knew her.

recommendations.title: Goodnight Mommy
recommendations.overview: In the heat of the summer lays a lonesome house in the countryside where nine year old twin brothers await their mother’s return.  When she comes home, bandaged after cosmetic surgery, nothing is like before and the children start to doubt whether th

recommendations.title: Summer of 84
recommendations.overview: After suspecting that their police officer neighbor is a serial killer, a group of teenage friends spend their summer spying on him and gathering evidence, but as they get closer to discovering the truth, things get dangerous.
recommendations.director: Yoann-Karl Whissell, François Simard, Anouk Whissell
